title: All Terrain Rapid Deployment Pod
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:AT-RDP.jpg|thumb|right|250px|]]
The '''All Terrain Rapid Deployment Pod (AT-RDP)''' was a type of [[Imperial Remnant|Imperial]] [[Assault ship/Legends|assault ship]] used in [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] invasions.

==Characteristics==
[[File:AT-RDP_bridge.jpg|thumb|left|190px|The pod's observation deck]]
These massive landing pods could house four [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-STs]] and several passengers, such as [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and [[Reborn]]s. A large number of these pods could be docked underneath the ''[[Doomgiver]]'', where they could be launched to land on the planetary surface. They were egg-shaped and held four levels aboard, with an elevator in the center of each level to access the others. Four AT-STs were on the large bottom deck facing each ramps, while passengers were positioned on two higher levels. A commander monitored the ships communication and sensor arrays on the top observation deck.

==History==
AT-RDPs were assembled inside the [[Cairn Installation]] by the [[Empire Reborn]]. At one point, [[Kyle Katarn]] had to sabotage the construction of one such ship inside the installation to make his way to the Doomgiver. The pods were later used in the [[Battle of Yavin 4 (Empire Reborn)|Battle of the Jedi Praxeum]] to land Remnant troops and walkers, including Stormtroopers, [[Wetland assault stormtrooper|Swamptroopers]], Reborns, [[Shadowtrooper]]s and AT-STs. While some pods managed to land on the [[Moon/Legends|Moon]], many of them had been destroyed by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron's]] [[T-65B X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-Wings]] in orbit after Kyle Katarn alterted the squadron using the Doomgiver's communication system.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Similar but smaller pods appear in ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]'', where they are used to deploy AT-ST walkers on [[Felucia/Legends|Felucia]] and [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' {{1st}}
